hero_tag: Akoranga · Reo Rua · AI me te Rangatiratanga o ngā Raraunga Māori
hero_sub: E ono ngā wāhanga e tūhura ana i te AI, i te mana motuhake o ngā raraunga Māori, i ngā tikanga, me te mana whakahaere o ngā iwi taketake ki runga i ngā hangahanga matihiko — ka whakaakohia i te reo Māori me te reo Pākehā.
social_kit_intro: E 30 ngā tohu mai i ngā ahurea 11. He whakaahua, he kupu hashtag, he hononga ki ngā wāhanga akoranga katoa. CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 — kia tuari kē.
